description_text: 2Pack Universal Car Rear Bumper Protector Lip Diffuser Spoiler Splitter Black Feature: - Comes with 2PC Rear lip wrap angle splitters - Please measure your Rear lip wrap angle and make sure these splitters will fit - Custom fit most vehicles, product may require drilling holes and apply bolts to attach to your bumper - Use double side adhesive tape or drill holes and bolt on to your bumper - Give your car a more aggressive racing look - Professional installation is highly recommended Specification: Type: Rear Lip Wrap Angle Splitters - Material: Polyurethane (ABS) - Color: Bright Black - Size: As pictures show - Placement on Vehicle: Front, Left, Lower, Rear - Fitment Type: Performance/Custom - Fitment: Car Universal Package Includes: 2 x Rear Lip Wrap Angle Splitters 6x Bolts Note: 1. Please Check The Size Detail Carefully Before You Purchase 2. Due to computers display colors differently,the color may vary slightly from the above images,Thanks for your understanding! 3. Manual measured, please allow 2-4mm error 4. You have any questions, please feel free to contact us, we will reply as soon as possible and help you solve! Payment Delivery details About Taxes About us Contact us Payment is managed by eBay. We will ship to your eBay address. Please make sure your address setting is correct before checkout.
